Note: `bash scripts/verify-local.sh --changed` passed the web side, then
hit local macOS backend pyright dependency-resolution noise
(`reportMissingImports` across unrelated FastAPI/favie_common imports).
Targeted backend pyright for the changed files passed; CI remains the
authoritative full backend check.

commit.message:
fix(web): proxy claw requests through api route (#2482)

## Summary
- Add a same-origin `/api/claw/[...path]` proxy for `web/app`
claw-interface traffic.
- Route `callClawInterfaceAPI` through `/api/claw` so browser callers no
longer require `NEXT_PUBLIC_CLAW_INTERFACE_URL`.
- Forward `Authorization` when present, otherwise derive bearer auth
from the HttpOnly `zc_session` cookie, and move org agent pack service
calls onto the shared helper.

## Tests
- `pnpm --dir web/app exec vitest run
tests/unit/lib/api/claw-interface.unit.spec.ts
tests/unit/lib/api/claw-proxy.unit.spec.ts
tests/unit/services/org-agent-packs.unit.spec.ts`
- `pnpm --dir web/app exec vitest run tests/unit/services`
- `pnpm --dir web/app exec tsc --noEmit`
- `bash scripts/verify-web.sh web/app/src/lib/api/claw-interface.ts
web/app/src/lib/api/claw-proxy.ts
'web/app/src/app/api/claw/[...path]/route.ts'
web/app/src/services/org-agent-packs.ts
web/app/tests/unit/lib/api/claw-interface.unit.spec.ts
web/app/tests/unit/lib/api/claw-proxy.unit.spec.ts
web/app/tests/unit/services/org-agent-packs.unit.spec.ts`
- `bash scripts/verify-changed.sh`

## Summary
- Add a same-origin `/api/claw/[...path]` proxy for `web/app`
claw-interface traffic.
- Route `callClawInterfaceAPI` through `/api/claw` so browser callers no

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+import { proxyClawErrorResponse, proxyClawRequest } from '@/lib/api/claw-proxy'
+
+export const maxDuration = 600
+
+interface RouteContext {
+  params: Promise<{ path: string[] }>
+}
+
+async function handle(request: Request, context: RouteContext): Promise<Response> {
+  try {
+    const { path } = await context.params
+    return await proxyClawRequest(request, path)
+  } catch (error) {
+    return proxyClawErrorResponse(error)
+  }
+}
+
+export const GET = handle
+export const HEAD = handle
+export const POST = handle
+export const PUT = handle
+export const PATCH = handle
+export const DELETE = handle

@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+import { getBackendServiceURL, getCFAccessHeaders } from '@/lib/api/proxy'
+import { accountTokenFromRequest } from '@/lib/auth/session-cookie'
+
+const HOP_BY_HOP_HEADERS = new Set([
+  'connection',
+  'content-encoding',
+  'content-length',
+  'keep-alive',
+  'proxy-authenticate',
+  'proxy-authorization',
+  'te',
+  'trailer',
+  'transfer-encoding',
+  'upgrade',
+])
+
+type RequestInitWithDuplex = RequestInit & { duplex?: 'half' }
+
+function getClawInterfaceURL(): string {
+  return getBackendServiceURL().replace(/\/+$/, '')
+}
+
+function buildTargetURL(path: string[], search: string): string {
+  const normalizedPath = path.map(encodeURIComponent).join('/')
+  return `${getClawInterfaceURL()}/${normalizedPath}${search}`
+}
+
+function forwardRequestHeaders(request: Request): Headers {
+  const headers = new Headers()
+  const contentType = request.headers.get('content-type')
+  const accept = request.headers.get('accept')
+  const authorization = request.headers.get('authorization')
+  const virtualKey = request.headers.get('x-ecap-virtual-key')
+
+  if (contentType) headers.set('content-type', contentType)
+  if (accept) headers.set('accept', accept)
+  if (authorization) {
+    headers.set('authorization', authorization)
+  } else {
+    const token = accountTokenFromRequest(request)
+    if (token) headers.set('authorization', `Bearer ${token}`)
+  }
+  if (virtualKey) headers.set('x-ecap-virtual-key', virtualKey)
+
+  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(getCFAccessHeaders())) {
+    headers.set(key, value)
+  }
+
+  return headers
+}
+
+function responseHeadersFromBackend(response: Response): Headers {
+  const headers = new Headers()
+  response.headers.forEach((value, key) => {
+    if (!HOP_BY_HOP_HEADERS.has(key.toLowerCase())) {
+      headers.set(key, value)
+    }
+  })
+  return headers
+}
+
+export async function proxyClawRequest(request: Request, path: string[]): Promise<Response> {
+  const sourceUrl = new URL(request.url)
+  const method = request.method.toUpperCase()
+  const hasBody = method !== 'GET' && method !== 'HEAD'
+  const fetchInit: RequestInitWithDuplex = {
+    method,
+    headers: forwardRequestHeaders(request),
+    body: hasBody ? request.body : undefined,
+    redirect: 'manual',
+    ...(hasBody ? { duplex: 'half' } : {}),
+  }
+  const response = await fetch(buildTargetURL(path, sourceUrl.search), fetchInit)
+
+  return new Response(response.body, {
+    status: response.status,
+    statusText: response.statusText,
+    headers: responseHeadersFromBackend(response),
+  })
+}
+
+export function proxyClawErrorResponse(error: unknown): Response {
+  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Proxy request failed'
+  return Response.json({ success: false, error: message }, { status: 500 })
+}

+import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
+
+import { setupFetchSpy } from '../../helpers/factories'
+
+const ORIGINAL_ENV = process.env
+
+describe('lib/api/claw-proxy', () => {
+  let fetchSpy: ReturnType<typeof vi.fn>
+
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    fetchSpy = setupFetchSpy()
+    process.env = {
+      ...ORIGINAL_ENV,
+      CLAW_INTERFACE_URL: 'https://claw.test/',
+    }
+  })
+
+  afterEach(() => {
+    process.env = ORIGINAL_ENV
+    vi.resetModules()
+  })
+
+  it('forwards method, query string, auth, content type, and streams the raw body', async () => {
+    fetchSpy.mockResolvedValueOnce(
+      new Response(JSON.stringify({ ok: true }), {
+        status: 202,
+        headers: {
+          'content-type': 'application/json',
+          'content-encoding': 'gzip',
+          'content-length': '128',
+          connection: 'keep-alive',
+        },
+      }),
+    )
+    const request = new Request('https://app.test/api/claw/orgs/org_1/packs?p=1', {
+      method: 'POST',
+      headers: {
+        authorization: 'Bearer tok_1',
+        'content-type': 'application/json',
+        accept: 'application/json',
+      },
+      body: JSON.stringify({ name: 'Acme' }),
+    })
+
+    const { proxyClawRequest } = await import('@/lib/api/claw-proxy')
+    const response = await proxyClawRequest(request, ['orgs', 'org_1', 'packs'])
+
+    expect(response.status).toBe(202)
+    expect(await response.json()).toEqual({ ok: true })
+    expect(response.headers.get('content-type')).toBe('application/json')
+    expect(response.headers.get('content-encoding')).toBeNull()
+    expect(response.headers.get('content-length')).toBeNull()
+    expect(response.headers.get('connection')).toBeNull()
+    expect(fetchSpy).toHaveBeenCalledWith('https://claw.test/orgs/org_1/packs?p=1', {
+      method: 'POST',
+      headers: expect.any(Headers),
+      body: request.body,
+      redirect: 'manual',
+      duplex: 'half',
+    })
+    const headers = fetchSpy.mock.calls[0]?.[1]?.headers as Headers
+    expect(headers.get('authorization')).toBe('Bearer tok_1')
+    expect(headers.get('content-type')).toBe('application/json')
+    expect(headers.get('accept')).toBe('application/json')
+  })
+
+  it('uses the HttpOnly session cookie when Authorization is absent', async () => {
+    fetchSpy.mockResolvedValueOnce(new Response('{}', { status: 200 }))
+    const cookieToken = 'c'.repeat(40)
+    const request = new Request('https://app.test/api/claw/account/me', {
+      headers: {
+        cookie: `zc_session=${cookieToken}`,
+      },
+    })
+
+    const { proxyClawRequest } = await import('@/lib/api/claw-proxy')
+    await proxyClawRequest(request, ['account', 'me'])
+
+    const headers = fetchSpy.mock.calls[0]?.[1]?.headers as Headers
+    expect(headers.get('authorization')).toBe(`Bearer ${cookieToken}`)
+  })
+
+  it('preserves encoded path segments and forwards Cloudflare Access headers', async () => {
+    process.env.CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID = 'cf-id'
+    process.env.CF_ACCESS_CLIENT_SECRET = 'cf-secret'
+    fetchSpy.mockResolvedValueOnce(new Response('{}', { status: 200 }))
+    const request = new Request('https://app.test/api/claw/computers/computer%201/agents/agent%2F1')
+
+    const { proxyClawRequest } = await import('@/lib/api/claw-proxy')
+    await proxyClawRequest(request, ['computers', 'computer 1', 'agents', 'agent/1'])
+
+    expect(fetchSpy.mock.calls[0]?.[0]).toBe('https://claw.test/computers/computer%201/agents/agent%2F1')
+    const headers = fetchSpy.mock.calls[0]?.[1]?.headers as Headers
+    expect(headers.get('CF-Access-Client-Id')).toBe('cf-id')
+    expect(headers.get('CF-Access-Client-Secret')).toBe('cf-secret')
+  })
+})
